title: Peruvian Crispy Fish Fry
description: A Peruvian-inspired dish featuring crispy fried fish, served with a crunchy side.
instructions: 1. Prepare the stir-fry sauce according to the package instructions or recipe.
2. Cut the fish fillets into bite-sized pieces.
3. Season the fish with salt and pepper.
4. Dredge the fish pieces in the crispy cornmeal, shaking off excess.
5. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Fry the fish pieces until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Transfer the fried fish to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. In a separate pan, heat the stir-fry sauce over medium heat.
9. Add the chopped cilantro to the stir-fry sauce and stir to combine.
10. Serve the crispy fried fish with the crunchy coleslaw and stir-fry sauce on the side.
11. Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges, if desired.
